{"code":"(def unresolved-sentry (filter (fn [i] (= (:status i) "unresolved")) (sentry_issues {})))

(def service-issue-counts (frequencies (map :project unresolved-sentry)))

(def hot-services (into {} (filter (fn [[svc count]] (> count 5)) service-issue-counts)))

hot-services)"}

tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(let [unresolved (filter (fn [i] (= (:status i) "unresolved")) (sentry_issues {}))
      counts (frequencies (map :project unresolved))
      hot (into {} (filter (fn [[svc cnt]] (> cnt 5)) counts))]
  hot)"}
